name: Dr. Beanies | MEWGENICS
description:
🐱 𝙼̶𝚊̶𝚍̶ Genius scientist! You're not a cat... are you? 🧑‍🔬

Requested? YES! | Self-Indulgent? YES!

"Who let you back in here?! Leave!"

!!4 SFW INTROS - 2 SPOUSE USER INTROS - 2 ANTHRO USER INTROS - 1 SMUT - ONE BLANK!!

You're just the average resident of Boon County, trying to get through your dreary little life, make ends meet, and stay away from the weird cat lady's house with all the fucked-up cats. You've heard stories about this weird creepy old guy that likes to pick up stray cats and do all kinds of weird stuff to them. I'd keep my distance if I were you...

Baked in special flavors:

  • Smartypants char

  • MEWWWWGENICS!

  • Maybe spoilers for Mewgenics...? I'll try to avoid it

  • Experimentation

  • Furry shit (if you go down that route)

  • Latex kink (kinda)

RELATED BOTS:

Steven the Steven!

The Organ Grinder

INTROS:

  1. First meeting. You died, and he brought you back to life. You are now his assistant.

  2. First meeting. He desperately needs a new assistant. He decides you'll have to do.

  3. Make yourself useful for once! Help him do experiments on these poor kitties! (How long you've known him is up to you, but it's assumed you're his assistant).

  4. He finds out he has a fat crush on you, and is a bit hesitant to act on it because he feels you're too young for him.

  5. You're his spouse, and you're trying to get him to take a break for once and come to bed.

  6. You're his spouse, and he feels bad for not focusing on you more, so he decides to take you out to dinner.

  7. (ANTHRO. DON'T BE WEIRD.) You're a random cat he finds and decides is perfect for experimentation

  8. You're one of his favorite cats and don't care about the other cats seeing his blatant favoritism.

  9. You and him decide to have sex (friends with benefits, lovers, up to you.), and he wants to strap you to the exam table.

  10. Make your own Scenario!!!

Yip Yap:

Another 10 intros! (kill me). My mind is jus too creative.
